nasb.text: The high priest stood up and said to Him, “Do You not answer? What is it that these men are testifying against You?”

esv.text: And the high priest stood up and said, “Have you no answer to make? What is it that these men testify against you?”

cnv.text: 大祭司就站起來，對耶穌說：“你為甚麼不回答？這些人作證，控告你的是甚麼呢？”

ccb.text: 大祭司站起来质问耶稣：“你不回答吗？这些人作证控告你的是什么呢？”

csbs.text: 于是大祭司就站起来，问耶稣：“对这些人控告你的事，你什么都不回应吗？”
